The '''YT-1250 freighter''' was a model of [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:YT-1250_Transport.jpg|thumb|left|200px|YT-1250 schematics]]
The YT-1250 had 20% less cargo capacity than the stock YT-1200, but it made up for that by having stronger engines, heavier weapons, and a basic set of shields. It wasn't as highly upgradeable as most [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] freighters, but it was still able to be modified to suit the user's needs.

==Usage==
Since the YT-1250 was upgraded and reinforced, it was marketed as suitable for light defense duties, cargo transporting in hazardous areas, and being used as an armed escort for freighter convoys.

==History==
The YT-1250 was an unusual model for CEC, since it wasn't a new design. With the release of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]], CEC found itself with a huge back stock of [[YT-1200 medium freighter|YT-1200s]] and [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210s]]. In an effort to sell these ships, they redesigned the older ships and sold them as a "new" design. Sales remained sluggish but CEC was finally able to sell the whole line off to various small systems and militant trade guilds.

[[Station TFP-9]] in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]] had two such freighters for defense.
